title: carex elata subsp. reuteriana
intro: Carex elata subsp. reuteriana, also known as the broad-leaved sedge, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the sedge family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex elata subsp. reuteriana are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its rhizomes are sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
